Package global.thalion.ttio

Class RamanSpectrum

java.lang.Object
global.thalion.ttio.Spectrum
global.thalion.ttio.RamanSpectrum
public class RamanSpectrum extends Spectrum
1-D Raman spectrum: wavenumber + intensity arrays plus laser excitation / power / integration metadata.

API status: Stable (v0.11, M73).

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C TTIORamanSpectrum, Python ttio.raman_spectrum.RamanSpectrum.
